main.description: Revoke access permissions from a user for a shared repository. Requires auth and repository ownership or admin privileges.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repository to revoke access from.

userDid.description: The DID of the user to revoke access from.

success.description: Whether the access was successfully revoked.

revokedAt.description: Timestamp when the access was revoked.

errors.name: RepositoryNotFound
errors.description: The specified repository could not be found.

errors.name: UserNotFound
errors.description: The specified user could not be found.

errors.name: InsufficientPermissions
errors.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to revoke access from this repository.

errors.name: AccessNotFound
errors.description: The specified user does not have active access to this repository.
